description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a slim build, standing upright with arms extended outward. He is dressed in a collared shirt with short sleeves, layered under a sleeveless vest, and wears fitted trousers. The figure's shoes are simple and formal, complementing the overall semi-formal attire. His facial features are smooth and simplified, with a distinct nose, lips, and ears, and his hair is neatly parted to one side. The hands and fingers are elongated and slightly stylized, matching the overall aesthetic. The figure's posture and attire suggest he could be a professional or office worker in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult male figure in semi-formal attire with a collared shirt, vest, trousers, and formal shoes, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, collared shirt, vest, trousers, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the vest, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, vest, trousers, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the vest, and the straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve collared shirt with a sleeveless vest and fitted trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
